allow: Bash(powershell -Command "[math]::Round\(\(Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem\).FreePhysicalMemory/1MB,1\); 'GB free of'; [math]::Round\(\(Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem\).TotalVisibleMemorySize/1MB,1\); 'GB total'; echo '---CPU---'; \(Get-CimInstance Win32_Processor\).LoadPercentage; '% CPU'")

Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-Process -Name '\\''msedgewebview2'\\'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object WorkingSet64 -Sum | ForEach-Object { '\\''msedgewebview2 total: '\\'' + [math]::Round\($_.Sum/1MB\) + '\\'' MB across '\\'' + $_.Count + '\\'' processes'\\'' }; Get-Process -Name '\\''chrome'\\'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object WorkingSet64 -Sum | ForEach-Object { '\\''chrome total: '\\'' + [math]::Round\($_.Sum/1MB\) + '\\'' MB across '\\'' + $_.Count + '\\'' processes'\\'' }; Get-Process -Name '\\''claude'\\'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object WorkingSet64 -Sum | ForEach-Object { '\\''claude total: '\\'' + [math]::Round\($_.Sum/1MB\) + '\\'' MB across '\\'' + $_.Count + '\\'' processes'\\'' }')

Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-Process | Measure-Object WorkingSet64 -Sum | ForEach-Object { '\\''Total process memory: '\\'' + [math]::Round\($_.Sum/1GB,1\) + '\\'' GB'\\'' }; echo '\\''---GPU---'\\''; try { nvidia-smi --query-gpu=utilization.gpu,utilization.memory,memory.used,memory.total --format=csv,noheader 2>&1 } catch { '\\''nvidia-smi not available'\\'' }')

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name putty -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Get-Item "C:\\Users\\matth\\Downloads\\putty.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Length, LastWriteTime, @{N='Signed';E={\(Get-AuthenticodeSignature $_.FullName\).Status}})

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Check usbipd-win ==="; Get-Command usbipd -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Source; usbipd --version 2>&1; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== If not installed, install via winget ==="; if \(-not \(Get-Command usbipd -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\)\) { winget install --id dorssel.usbipd-win --accept-source-agreements --accept-package-agreements 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5 })
